abstract.text: Tencent Cloud IM group ID. Optional parameter. Only needs to be provided in the call initiated from a group chat scenario. When provided, the system will route signaling and associate this call with the group's call records, for sending call start/end status messages in the group chat and for inviting group members to join the call during the call. For one-on-one calls, or ad-hoc multi-party calls not bound to a specific group, always leave this empty.
Call parameter configuration, used to set room ID, timeout, custom data, and other parameters when initiating an audio/video call.

Tencent Cloud IM group ID. Optional parameter. Only needs to be provided in the call initiated from a group chat scenario. When provided, the system will route signaling and associate this call with the group's call records, for sending call start/end status messages in the group chat and for inviting group members to join the call during the call. For one-on-one calls, or ad-hoc multi-party calls not bound to a specific group, always leave this empty.
AtomicX Core SDK, providing complete features including login, live streaming, calling, messaging, and device management.
